Get Early Access
Three Modes

Tell Violet. Ask Violet. Practice with Violet.

Violet works the way you already do. No training needed, no forms to fill out.

Tell Violet

Employees report concerns by chatting, speaking in their browser, or calling a real phone number. No forms, no hold music. Available 24/7 in 50+ languages.

Ask Violet

"How many harassment cases this quarter?" "Which department has the longest cycle times?" Query your data in plain English. Instant answers, no dashboards to learn.

Practice with Violet

Employees practice handling real workplace scenarios in AI voice conversations. Violet scores empathy, judgment, and escalation decisions. Deploy as ethics training for your whole team.

Platform

Days of paperwork, done in minutes.

Every stage of the compliance lifecycle, from the first policy to the final report.

Investigate

Investigation reports that write themselves.

Set your findings. Violet writes the supporting analysis. Full credibility assessments for every party, citations from your actual policies, and conclusions grounded in the preponderance of the evidence standard. A built-in confidence check warns you if the evidence doesn't support your call. Choose policy-based or conduct-based findings. Upload sample reports and Violet matches your writing voice.

Policies

Stop drafting policies from scratch.

Generate jurisdiction-aware policies for any of the 50 states. Upload your existing ones and Violet finds the gaps, with severity ratings and one-click fixes. Then generate a branded employee handbook with plain-language summaries, practical do's and don'ts, and track who's read it.

Training

Training from your own cases, not generic videos.

Violet generates interactive ethics scenarios from your anonymized case data. Employees learn the policy, then practice handling the situation in a live voice conversation, scored on empathy, response quality, and escalation decisions. Assign modules, track completion, and see where your organization needs the most education.

Reports

The board-ready report, generated in one click.

Risk matrices, case breakdowns by department, substantiation trends, and your highest-priority open cases, all in a report your leadership can actually act on. Stop spending a week building a PowerPoint every quarter.

Analytics

Your caseload, at a glance.

Open cases, cycle times, time saved, case rates by department and issue type, all updating in real time. Ask Violet anything about your data in plain English and get an instant answer. No dashboards to learn, no exports to build.

Interviews

Record & Transcribe

Record interviews directly in Violet. AI transcribes with speaker labels, and every word feeds into your reports and outlines automatically.

Timeline

Visual Timeline

Upload documents and enter interviews. Violet builds the chronology and flags where accounts contradict each other -- the discrepancies an investigator would catch, surfaced instantly.

Tell Violet

A real phone number. An AI that listens.

Give your employees a dedicated hotline. When they call, Violet has a natural conversation, captures every detail, and drops a fully triaged report in your inbox. What legacy hotlines charge $10k–50k/year for, Violet does for pennies per call.

How It Works

Five steps. Full lifecycle.

From setting up your policies to closing the case and training your team.

1

Build policies

Draft or upload policies. Violet finds gaps and fixes them. Generate a handbook and track acknowledgments.

2

Employee tells Violet

Chat, voice, or phone call. Violet listens, asks clarifying questions, and files a triaged report.

3

Violet drafts

Investigation plan, interview outlines that build on prior testimony, and a full report with credibility analysis.

4

You decide

Set your findings. Violet warns you if evidence is thin. Export to Google Docs and close the case.

5

Train & prevent

Generate training from closed cases. Employees practice in voice role-play. Track completion across your org.

Why Violet

Not just case management.

Legacy tools manage your cases. Violet runs your compliance program.

Questions

Frequently asked questions

Who is Violet built for?
External workplace investigators, internal HR and compliance teams, and employee relations professionals. Whether you're a solo investigator managing your own caseload or a team running a full compliance program, Violet fits your workflow.
Does Violet make legal decisions?
No. Violet drafts, you decide. The investigator sets the findings and recommendations. Violet writes the supporting analysis. A built-in confidence check warns you if the evidence doesn't support your conclusion. All AI outputs include appropriate disclaimers and should be reviewed by qualified professionals.
What reports come built in?
Investigation reports with credibility analysis, interview outlines, investigation plans, triage memos, written warnings, employee handbooks, and quarterly executive reports with industry benchmarking, all generated from your data with one click.
Where is my data stored?
Your data is hosted in the United States on production-grade infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. Investigation data is never used to train AI models. Each organization's data is fully isolated with no cross-tenant access.
Can I export my data?
Yes. Investigation reports export to Google Docs, quarterly reports to PDF and PowerPoint, and handbooks to PDF, Word, or web. Case data CSV export and full data portability are on our near-term roadmap.
What access controls are available?
Violet includes role-based access control so you can control who sees what. Assign roles from Admin down to Viewer, and every action is scoped to your organization. Investigators only see their own cases, managers see their team's, and admins control it all.
What compliance standards does Violet follow?
Violet is built with security-first architecture: encrypted data, tenant isolation, input validation, and rate-limited APIs. SOC 2 readiness, bias testing, and vendor security documentation are on our 2026 roadmap. We're happy to complete your security questionnaire.
Can external investigators use Violet?
Absolutely. The Violet Investigator plan is designed specifically for solo and external investigators. You get AI investigation reports, AI interview outlines, Google Drive integration, and Coach Violet without needing the intake or policy features that internal teams use.

Built by an investigator,
for investigators.
